## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on the CMS migration and education hub project status.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CMS Migration Paused:** The Craft → ContentStack migration is paused pending a project reassessment by Meaghan's new team.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Education Hub Integrated:** The planned Education Hub is now integrated into the main launch specs to avoid a separate V2/wave 2 follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Content is Ready:** Joe's team completed a content audit, tagging existing blogs for migration and creating a spreadsheet to guide the process.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

## Topics

### CMS Migration Status

  - [The platforming project (Craft → ContentStack) is paused.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Reason:** A project reassessment is underway by Meaghan's new team, which she joined last week.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The launch date is currently undefined.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### Education Hub Integration

  - [The planned Education Hub for Joe's team is now integrated into the main launch specs.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This avoids a separate V2 or wave 2 follow-up, simplifying the launch process.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Action:** All new content is being tagged "education" for a seamless transition.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### Content Migration Readiness

  - [Joe's team completed a content audit, preparing the migration.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Existing blogs tagged for migration.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [A migration spreadsheet detailing content to keep/discard and any necessary redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Outcome:** This work puts the project in a strong position for when the migration resumes.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:** Message Abdallah on Slack regarding the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
      - [**Context:** Abdallah is at the SCO conference this week.](https://fathom.video/share/AvT3yQMT1aFSsazByfzqs2D8jNoA4F9W?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
